name: DeWitt Golf Center
about: DeWitt Golf Center is a state-of-the-art practice facility serving Clinton County and the greater mid-Michigan area. The venue offers a variety of options for golfers of any age and skill, including a driving range, miniature golf, a pro shop, and ice cream shop. For simulator golf, the facility features Full Swing Golf Simulators, which allow up to eight people to play simultaneously. The on-site pro shop provides comprehensive club fitting and repair services to meet customized needs and ensure timely completion.
why_golfers_like_it: Simulators accommodate up to 8 people, perfect for large groups and events
State-of-the-art practice facility with diverse offerings beyond golf
On-site professional club fitting and repair services available

simulator_hardware.notes: High-quality simulator capable of handling up to 8 players at once.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for an optimal experience, though the pro shop may offer rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; however, the facility has an on-site ice cream shop and pro shop.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Two people generally can complete 9 holes in one hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue features an 18-hole miniature golf course that offers fun for all ages.
